ns0:entry.ns0:title: AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome
Language: go
Network-wide ads & trackers blocking DNS server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Gentleman-Programming/engram
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/engram
Language: go
Persistent memory system for AI coding agents. Agent-agnostic Go binary with SQLite + FTS5, MCP server, HTTP API, CLI, and TUI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Gentleman-Programming/gentle-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/gentle-ai
Language: go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
Language: go
CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tencent/WeKnora
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tencent/WeKnora
Language: go
Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Grok订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chenhg5/cc-connect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chenhg5/cc-connect
Language: go
Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chenyme/grok2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chenyme/grok2api
Language: go
面向 Grok Build、Grok Web 与 Grok Console 的多账号 API 网关

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/Fabric
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/Fabric
Language: go
Fabric is an open-source framework for augmenting humans using AI. It provides a modular system for solving specific problems using a crowdsourced set of AI prompts that can be used anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dapr/dapr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dapr/dapr
Language: go
Dapr is a portable runtime for building distributed applications across cloud and edge, combining event-driven architecture with workflow orchestration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix
Language: go
DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for your terminal. Engineered around prefix-cache stability — leave it running.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: filebrowser/filebrowser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/filebrowser/filebrowser
Language: go
📂 Web File Browser

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kgateway-dev/kgateway
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kgateway-dev/kgateway
Language: go
The Cloud-Native API Gateway and AI Gateway

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kserve/kserve
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kserve/kserve
Language: go
Standardized Distributed Generative and Predictive AI Inference Platform for Scalable, Multi-Framework Deployment on Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubeflow/trainer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubeflow/trainer
Language: go
Distributed AI Model Training and LLM Fine-Tuning on Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubernetes/autoscaler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubernetes/autoscaler
Language: go
Autoscaling components for Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/agent-framework-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/agent-framework-go
Language: go
A framework for building, orchestrating and deploying AI agents and multi-agent workflows with support for Go.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: multica-ai/multica
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/multica-ai/multica
Language: go
The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pocket-id/pocket-id
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pocket-id/pocket-id
Language: go
An easy-to-use OpenID Connect Certified™ and OAuth 2.0 provider that lets users sign in to your applications with passkeys.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: schollz/croc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/schollz/croc
Language: go
Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vllm-project/semantic-router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vllm-project/semantic-router
Language: go
